name: "Russian" Twins
description:
Sorry y'all I haven't been posting for awhile, lost motivation, this will be my first multi-character bot and a little early Christmas present, enjoy!

Quick Note: This image and it's characters were created by me on Picrew yet it watermarks another person for some reason, I tried a few ways but I couldn't get it off.

I just created this at 1:31 AM so don't blame me.
